specific_question: During Q4 2024, how did follow-up appointments at MediConn Solutions work differently for mental health counselling versus general practitioner consultations, and is there any plan to change this difference by 2025?
answer: During Q4 2024, mental health sessions typically involved recurring appointments booked in series (weekly or bi-weekly), while doctor consultations were one-time unless the physician recommended a follow-up. According to a customer service survey conducted by MediConn's customer service team in January 2024, 75 % of patients didn't understand they needed to manually book subsequent mental health sessions, which resulted in a high volume of customer service calls. MediConn Solutions' executives are aware of this issue and have made plans to address these differences by 2025.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
